description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a predominantly black and blue color scheme, accented by metallic and worn textures. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. The rifle includes a collapsible stock at the rear, a pistol grip, and a long, vented handguard with a rail system for mounting accessories. The barrel is standard length and appears to be fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The magazine is a detachable box type, integrated seamlessly into the lower receiver. The overall finish is matte with some glossy highlights, and the surface shows signs of wear, suggesting frequent use in urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, and a black-blue worn finish, featuring a long handguard and flash hider.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, and magazine well.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, revealing similar features as view 0 with more detail on the stock and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and alignment of the upper receiver and barrel.
